20.anchor: and those at the rear into the Mediterranean.
20.note: Hebrew into the eastern sea, . . . into the western sea.

25.anchor: the stripping locusts, and the cutting locusts.
25.note: The precise identification of the four kinds of locusts mentioned here is uncertain.

4.note: The precise identification of the four kinds of locusts mentioned here is uncertain.

6.anchor: You have sold the people of Judah and Jerusalem to the Greeks,
6.note: Hebrew to the peoples of Javan.

8.anchor: I will sell your sons and daughters to the people of Judah, and they will sell them to the people of Arabia,

13.note: Greek version reads for the harvest time has come.

18.anchor: watering the arid valley of acacias.
